caption: A person wearing a black long-sleeved garment holds a thin, silver-colored tube of adhesive over a craft catalog. The catalog is open to a page titled "FEELS LIKE FROST SUITE," which features various light-blue and purple floral themed paper products, including a purple card that reads "Yule tide Cheer!" and a small tag that says "Your wishes are coming true heart!". The person's right hand holds the tube, moving it slightly across the page from left to right and then tilting it. The catalog pages contain various product samples, including circular swatches and rectangular cardstock pieces, alongside text detailing different items like "FROSTED VOLUME." As the sequence progresses, the hand adjusts the angle of the glue tube, showcasing it against the background of the themed paper craft supplies.
